name: Marla Crystal Candlestick Lamp (Set of 2) - 31 Inch Height - LIT4165 - Crystal - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the stunning marla crystal candle table lamp set of two. Standing at 31 inches, the crystal and metal blend of this elegant pair offers a captivating touch to any decor. The sleek and modern design of these lamps brings a brilliant aura to your living area, bedroom, or office. The crystal color reflects light beautifully, enhancing the atmosphere with a clean and sophisticated glow. Whether you are reading, crafting, or simply relaxing, the marla crystal candle lamps add an exquisite element that complements your interior style. This set is perfect for those looking to infuse a touch of elegance and timeless charm into their homes. Add intrigue and make a bold statement with this stunning lamp set.
